title: Accor India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Accor India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Accor India! We are hiring a Guest Relations Manager for our Meerut team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Accor India:
Accor India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accor India!
